name: com.localkiagent/kiagent
title: KIAgent
description: Your mail, chats and documents indexed into a local SQLite corpus, served to AI clients over MCP.

subdomain.description: Your personal KIAgent subdomain, shown in the app's Remote section after you enable remote access (e.g. 'anna-x7k2' for anna-x7k2.localkiagent.com)
